headline: Strategic angle — Restore ESG fund access by implementing a ₹20 Cr independent audit and supplier remediation program
what_matters: Triggers BRSR Principle 5, GRI 408, SEBI disclosure obligations; non-compliance risks SEBI penalties of ₹10-50 Cr per violation and mandatory remediation under Child Labour Prohibition Act.
Adani Power faces a significant ESG score gap versus peers like JSW Energy due to weak supply chain labor controls, risking index exclusion and analyst downgrades.
Employer brand damage may drive senior talent attrition and community backlash; B2B customers may exclude Adani Power from ESG-sensitive procurement.
action: Strategic opportunity: Restore ESG fund access by implementing a ₹20 Cr independent audit and supplier remediation program
Competitive position: Adani Power loses ESG ground to JSW Energy, risking index exclusion and procurement loss
